caption: A man with a beard and short hair is recording in a studio against a grey acoustic foam wall. He is wearing a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. Positioned in front of him is a professional condenser microphone mounted on a boom arm, with the text "Audio-Technica AT2020" visible on the side of the microphone body. The man is speaking and gesturing with his left hand, which he moves across the top of his head as if sketching a boundary or a horizon line in the air. As the sequence progresses, his mouth opens and closes while speaking, and his hand shifts from a flat, horizontal position to a more open, sweeping motion. His expression is focused and animated as he communicates, while the camera remains in a static close-up shot focusing on his upper body.
